name: Oatmeal Crisps
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Uncooked old fashioned oats or quick cooking oats
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, pour milk and stir in lemon juice.
4. Add sugar, melted shortening, salt, and vanilla; mix until well combined.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients until blended.
6. Form rounded teaspoonfuls into 1-inch balls and place them 3-inches apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Using a glass dipped in water, press each ball to about 1/8-inch thickness.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set and lightly browned.
9. Let cool on the cookie sheets on wire racks for 45-60 seconds, just until firm enough to handle.
10. Remove from the sheets and let cool completely.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
